description: Transactions on Machine Learning Research — venue-specific policy signals

signals.name: Code repository URL (github/gitlab/zenodo — not just 'available upon request')
Author email address (required for non-anonymous TMLR submission)
Dedicated limitations or threats-to-validity section (strongly recommended by TMLR)
Generative AI / LLM tools disclosure (TMLR editorial policy)
Reproducibility: seed, environment, or Docker specification
